title: Fix gallery image loading issue causing blank display

requirements.text: Debug and identify the root cause of why the 60 gallery images (residential-1.png through residential-20.png, commercial-1.png through commercial-20.png, before-after-1.png through before-after-20.png) are not loading in the Portfolio component, examining image path construction, file existence checks, and any path resolution issues

quotes: Fix the current image loading issue

acceptanceCriteria: Identify specific reason why images are not loading (incorrect paths, missing files, wrong directory structure, or component logic errors)
Document the exact issue found in the Portfolio component or image file structure

requirements.text: Fix the Portfolio component to correctly load and display all 60 gallery images from the /assets/generated/ directory, ensuring proper path construction for residential-1.png through residential-20.png, commercial-1.png through commercial-20.png, and before-after-1.png through before-after-20.png
acceptanceCriteria: All 20 residential images display correctly in the residential gallery section
All 20 commercial images display correctly in the commercial gallery section
All 20 before/after images display correctly in the before/after gallery section
No blank or dark spaces appear in any gallery section

requirements.text: Verify that all 60 gallery images exist as static assets in the frontend/public/assets/generated directory with correct filenames and update or regenerate any missing image files
acceptanceCriteria: All 60 expected image files exist in frontend/public/assets/generated directory
Filenames match exactly: residential-1.png through residential-20.png, commercial-1.png through commercial-20.png, before-after-1.png through before-after-20.png
All images have valid dimensions and content

requirements.text: Ensure the error handling and fallback behavior in the Portfolio component is working correctly and logs helpful debugging information to the console when images fail to load
acceptanceCriteria: Console logs display clear error messages if images fail to load
Error handling provides useful debugging information about which specific images are failing
Fallback behavior prevents completely blank gallery sections

constraints: Do not regenerate all 60 gallery images unless absolutely necessary
Preserve existing Portfolio component structure and filtering functionality
Maintain the three gallery categories (residential, commercial, before/after)
Keep the existing image filenames and numbering scheme (1-20 for each category)
nonGoals: Changing the gallery layout or design
Adding new gallery categories or images
